tasks.title: Unify Lead Create/Edit Form - Create page (leads/(list)/new/page.tsx, 1029 lines) and Edit page (leads/[id]/edit/page.tsx, 464 lines) share no components. Issues: different API clients (trpc vs api), different field sets (BANT only in create but silently dropped), different styling, different validation, no auth guard on create. Fix: extract shared LeadForm component, unify API client, include all fields in both views, consistent styling.

tasks.title: Settings Pages Wiring - 4 settings pages with hardcoded data and inert buttons. Team: hardcoded 4-person array, inert Invite/Remove/Role buttons. Integrations: hardcoded provider list, inert Connect/Disconnect buttons. Notifications: hardcoded const, no useState, no onClick on toggles. Account: profile name/email has no save mutation, 3 security buttons (Change Password, Enable 2FA, Download Data) have no onClick. Wire all to real tRPC mutations and queries.

Account: profile name/email has no save mutation, 3 security buttons (Change Password, Enable 2FA, Download Data) have no onClick. Wire all to real tRPC mutations and queries.

tasks.title: Lead Audit Logging. Add audit log entries to all 20 lead router procedures using SecurityAuditService. GDPR-relevant operations (delete, bulkDelete, convert, export) MUST have audit trail. Include: actor (userId), action, entityType (Lead), entityId, tenantId, timestamp, metadata (old/new values for mutations). Integrate with existing audit infrastructure at apps/api/src/security/audit/.

tasks.title: Lead Create Form Fixes - BANT Drop, Revenue Mapping, Validation. Fix 3 HIGH issues: (1) BANT fields (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline) collected in create form but silently dropped on submit - never sent to API [F3]. (2) annualRevenue mapped to estimatedValue - semantic mismatch between company annual revenue and deal estimated value [F4]. (3) Edit form uses 'as any' cast with no client-side Zod validation - no inline field errors [F9]. Fix: Send BANT to API (add to createLeadSchema if needed), map annualRevenue correctly, add Zod resolver to edit form, remove as any.
tasks.description: Lead Create Form Fixes - BANT Drop, Revenue Mapping, Validation. Fix 3 HIGH issues: (1) BANT fields (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline) collected in create form but silently dropped on submit - never sent to API [F3]. (2) annualRevenue mapped to estimatedValue - semantic mismatch between company annual revenue and deal estimated value [F4]. (3) Edit form uses 'as any' cast with no client-side Zod validation - no inline field errors [F9]. Fix: Send BANT to API (add to createLeadSchema if needed), map annualRevenue correctly, add Zod resolver to edit form, remove as any.
tasks.summary: BANT fields persisted on create; annualRevenue and estimatedValue are distinct fields; edit form uses zodResolver with inline errors; no 'as any' casts; sourceOther sent to API; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: BANT fields persisted on create; annualRevenue and estimatedValue are distinct fields; edit form uses zodResolver with inline errors; no 'as any' casts; sourceOther sent to API; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: BANT fields persisted on create; annualRevenue and estimatedValue are distinct fields; edit form uses zodResolver with inline errors; no 'as any' casts; sourceOther sent to API; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Account Router Missing Procedures & Update Fix. (1) Update procedure silently drops revenue/employees/industry/parentAccountId fields accepted by schema (B-08). (2) accountListResponseSchema uses 'data' key but router returns 'accounts' — mismatch (B-09). (3) No updateRevenue procedure — domain Account.updateRevenue() unreachable via API (B-10). (4) No updateEmployeeCount procedure (B-11). (5) No categorizeIndustry procedure (B-12). (6) mapAccountToResponse returns raw WebsiteUrl value object instead of string (B-13). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 12.

tasks.title: Account Domain Model Fixes. (1) No AccountDeletedEvent — deletions produce no domain event; audit handler has mapping but event never emitted (D-01). (2) Account.toJSON() omits tenantId (B-15). (3) updateAccountInfo return value (Result) discarded by service — silent validation failures (B-16). (4) user!.userId non-null assertion in router (B-06). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 11-13.

tasks.title: Account List Page Type Safety & Filter Enums. (1) serverStats cast to any loses type safety (L-01, AccountsPageClient.tsx:154). (2) Double unsafe cast for withOpportunities stat (L-02, AccountsPageClient.tsx:206-208). (3) AccountTier type and getAccountTier() duplicated locally in AccountCard.tsx instead of using domain enum (L-04). (4) Contact status filter uses hardcoded inline option values instead of ContactStatus domain enum (F-09, AccountContactsList.tsx:81-83). (5) Opportunity stage filter uses hardcoded inline strings instead of OpportunityStage domain enum (F-12, AccountOpportunitiesList.tsx:109-114). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 4-5, 15.

tasks.title: Deal Detail Action Buttons — Wire 14 No-Ops. (1) EntityHeader 6 no-ops all with onClick: () => {} (F-08): Won → moveStage CLOSED_WON with success dialog; Lost → moveStage CLOSED_LOST with LossReasonModal (reuse from list page); Edit → navigate to edit form or open inline edit; Clone → duplicate mutation; Archive → set archived status; Delete → AlertDialog confirmation + delete mutation. (2) Stakeholder/Product/File 8 no-ops (F-09): Edit stakeholders → open edit dialog; Account icons → navigate to /accounts/[id] and website; Contact icons → mailto: and tel: links; Add Product → product association dialog; File upload → upload mutation; File links → presigned URL download. Depends on IFC-278 (real data needed for mutations). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 2.

tasks.title: Deal Router Correctness Fixes. (1) Name updates silently dropped — service has TODO 'Add updateName method' (B-04, OpportunityService.ts:313). Add updateName to domain and wire in service. (2) data.probability?.value unwrapping may be undefined if percentageSchema returns plain number (B-05, router:460). Verify and fix. (3) opportunityListResponseSchema key 'data' vs router key 'opportunities' mismatch (B-07, validators:88 vs router:437). (4) throwOpportunityCreateError maps VALIDATION_ERROR to NOT_FOUND — wrong HTTP semantic (B-09, router:55). (5) validateStageDeactivation throws plain Error → 500 instead of BAD_REQUEST (B-10, validators:214). (6) mapOpportunityToResponse drops closedAt field (B-11, mappers.ts:88-108). (7) CLOSED_LOST no-reason passes Zod but fails at service (B-12, router:322). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 6.

tasks.title: Deal Filter Wiring & Type Safety. (1) DealFilters state (filters) captured in page but NEVER passed to trpc.opportunity.list.useQuery — ownerId and dateRange selections have no effect on kanban view data (F-10, deals/(list)/page.tsx:214,226). (2) 'More Filters' button has no onClick handler (F-11, DealFilters.tsx). (3) Owner filter only has 2 hardcoded options: 'All Deals' and 'My Deals' — no dynamic user list (F-12). (4) transformDeals uses loose Record<string,unknown> casting at API boundary instead of typed response (F-19, types.ts:102-119). Wire filters to API query params; add server-side owner filter with user list; type-safe API response handling. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 3, 8.
